visual_description: A man in a dark red leather jacket walks into a dimly lit, green-hued room and sits down at a round table. He places a small white plate with red food on the table, then turns his back to the camera, resting his head in his hand. The table also holds a large purple and yellow drink container and a small grill with food on it.
audio_description: A low, continuous electronic hum or drone is audible throughout the clip.
